Hosted gaming parties

Bring everyone together. We’ll handle the rest.

PlayStation, Nintendo, racing and VR experiences brought directly to your venue, with setup and a dedicated host included.

View packagesSee the experience
  • ✦Delivered and set up
  • ✦Hosted throughout
  • ✦Games selected for the group

Simple planning

How it works

Choose your hosted experience, share the venue details and let us handle setup, hosting and pack-down.

1

Choose a package

Pick the hosted experience that best fits your group size and style of play.

2

Tell us about the venue

Share the room type, access notes and anything useful for planning the setup.

3

We deliver, set up and host

Your host brings the equipment, keeps play moving and packs everything away.

Party stories

What the day felt like.

Real experiences from hosted Party.LAN events.

“Everyone had something they wanted to play and the host kept the whole party moving.”

Alex, age 13

Leicester onyx

“The racing setup made the room feel like a proper event.”

Maya, age 15

Nottingham jade

“The VR moment was the thing everyone talked about afterwards.”

Sam, age 12

Derby onyx

Shared moments

See the experience. Explore the setup.

Switch between the atmosphere of the party and the equipment used to create it.

Frequently asked questions

A few things you may want to know.

Clear answers before you start planning.

ONYX is a premium experience for up to 6 players and includes PlayStation and Nintendo gaming racing and VR. JADE is designed for larger groups of up to 10 players playing across multiple stations.

ONYX accommodates up to 6 players. JADE accommodates up to 10 players.

No. We deliver the equipment set everything up and host the gaming session.

The best layout depends on the venue and package. Send us a photograph or approximate room dimensions and we’ll help confirm a suitable arrangement.

Yes. Games can be selected around the group and the type of experience you want.

Optional add-ons may be available or planned depending on the package room and date. Prices are confirmed during enquiry rather than shown as fixed.

Terms cover important service details including booking arrangements payment cancellations venue access space and power expectations supervision equipment care and other important conditions.

Read full Terms & Conditions

Explore packages

Compare ONYX and JADE to find the hosted setup that fits your party.
